// Мок-данные для имитации работы с Firebase
export const mockCompanies = [
  {
    id: "company1",
    name: "АвтоЛюкс",
    logo: "https://placehold.co/150x150/3f51b5/FFFFFF?text=A",
    color: "#3f51b5",
    isMain: true
  },
  {
    id: "company2",
    name: "КарПремиум",
    logo: "https://placehold.co/150x150/E91E63/FFFFFF?text=K",
    color: "#E91E63",
    isMain: false
  },
  {
    id: "company3",
    name: "МегаАвто",
    logo: "https://placehold.co/150x150/4CAF50/FFFFFF?text=M",
    color: "#4CAF50",
    isMain: false
  },
  {
    id: "company4",
    name: "Автопрестиж",
    logo: "https://placehold.co/150x150/FF9800/FFFFFF?text=A",
    color: "#FF9800",
    isMain: false
  }
];

export const mockRaffles = [
  {
    id: "raffle1",
    companyId: "company1",
    title: "BMW X5",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1617469767053-3f7c8cff7a6d?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Роскошный внедорожник премиум-класса с мощным двигателем и комфортным салоном",
    ticketsSold: 456,
    totalTickets: 1000,
    price: 1000,
    year: 2022,
    participants: 400,
    endDate: "2023-12-15",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-09-01")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle2",
    companyId: "company1",
    title: "Mercedes-Benz S-Class",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618843479313-40f8afb4b4d8?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Флагманский седан с передовыми технологиями и непревзойденным комфортом",
    ticketsSold: 789,
    totalTickets: 1500,
    price: 1500,
    year: 2023,
    participants: 700,
    endDate: "2024-01-20",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-10-15")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle3",
    companyId: "company2",
    title: "Audi Q7",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612825173281-9a193378527e?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Полноразмерный кроссовер с просторным салоном и современными технологиями",
    ticketsSold: 350,
    totalTickets: 1200,
    price: 1200,
    year: 2023,
    participants: 320,
    endDate: "2024-02-05",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-11-01")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle4",
    companyId: "company2",
    title: "Lexus RX",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1619405399517-d7fce0f13302?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Премиальный кроссовер с гибридной силовой установкой и комфортным салоном",
    ticketsSold: 410,
    totalTickets: 900,
    price: 900,
    year: 2022,
    participants: 380,
    endDate: "2024-01-30",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-10-20")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle5",
    companyId: "company3",
    title: "Tesla Model 3",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560958089-b8a1929cea89?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Электрический седан с запасом хода до 500 км и инновационным автопилотом",
    ticketsSold: 890,
    totalTickets: 2000,
    price: 800,
    year: 2023,
    participants: 800,
    endDate: "2023-12-10",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-08-15")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle6",
    companyId: "company3",
    title: "Volkswagen ID.4",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1617814065893-00757125efab?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Электрический кроссовер с просторным салоном и современным дизайном",
    ticketsSold: 320,
    totalTickets: 800,
    price: 600,
    year: 2023,
    participants: 290,
    endDate: "2024-02-15",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-11-10")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle7",
    companyId: "company4",
    title: "Porsche 911",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580274455191-1c62238fa333?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Легендарный спортивный автомобиль с непревзойденной управляемостью",
    ticketsSold: 980,
    totalTickets: 1000,
    price: 2000,
    year: 2023,
    participants: 950,
    endDate: "2023-12-05",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-09-05")
    }
  },
  {
    id: "raffle8",
    companyId: "company4",
    title: "Range Rover Sport",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1539799139339-50c5fe1e2b1b?q=80&w=1000&auto=format&fit=crop",
    description: "Премиальный внедорожник с роскошным салоном и высокой проходимостью",
    ticketsSold: 560,
    totalTickets: 1200,
    price: 1800,
    year: 2022,
    participants: 520,
    endDate: "2024-01-15",
    status: "active",
    createdAt: {
      toDate: () => new Date("2023-10-10")
    }
  }
];
